parsed.main_tf: provider "aws" { region = var.region } data "aws_ami" "ubuntu" { most_recent = true owners = ["099720109477"] filter { name = "name" values = ["ubuntu/images/hvm-ssd/ubuntu-focal-22.04-amd64-server-*"] } } resource "aws_instance" "mcp_server" { ami = data.aws_ami.ubuntu.id instance_type = var.instance_type key_name = var.key_name user_data = <<-EOF #!/bin/bash apt update apt install -y docker.io docker-compose usermod -aG docker ubuntu EOF tags = { Name = var.project_name } security_groups = [aws_security_group.mcp_sg.name] } resource "aws_security_group" "mcp_sg" { name = "mcp_sg" vpc_id = var.vpc_id ingress { from_port = 22 to_port = 22 protocol = "tcp" cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] } ingress { from_port = 80 to_port = 80 protocol = "tcp" cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] } ingress { from_port = 81 to_port = 81 protocol = "tcp" cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] } egress { from_port = 0 to_port = 0 protocol = "-1" cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] } tags = { Name = var.project_name } }
parsed.variables_tf: variable "region" { default = "eu-central-1" } variable "instance_type" { default = "t3.micro" } variable "key_name" { } variable "project_name" { default = "mcp-server" }
parsed.outputs_tf: output "public_ip" { value = aws_instance.mcp_server.public_ip } output "public_dns" { value = aws_instance.mcp_server.public_dns }
